programme.title: Maybe This Time

programme.title: 24/7 in Love
programme.desc: Jane (Kathryn Bernardo) wants to win tickets to Billy Fernandez's (Daniel Padilla) concert. She interviews several people and hears their love stories to figure out what she would do if the world were about to end.

programme.title: Magandang Hatinggabi
programme.desc: Teenagers experience a series of chilling events when they take a break from their road trip. Soon, they meet a heavily deformed man who tells them three hair-raising horror stories.

programme.title: Hesus, Rebolusyonaryo
programme.desc: Jesus Mariano, a young poet and revolutionary, decides to fight for his country, which is under military rule. Inspired by his childhood lover, he decides to change the rules.

programme.title: The Significant Other
programme.desc: A rising fashion model becomes friends with her idol. Things get complicated when they realize they are in love with the same man.

programme.title: Magic to Love
programme.desc: Xerox, an alien who is in love with RTW, a mannequin, lands on Earth to find his lover. In his search mission, he is helped by Twinkle and Boots.

programme.title: I Do? I Die!! (D'yos Ko Day!)
programme.desc: Unemployed duo Babalu and Mokong fail each time they apply for a job. They decide to rob a former employer in desperation.

programme.title: Makamandag na Bala
programme.desc: The soldiers Ricardo and Samuel stand in the way of the illegal activities of Mayor Antero Sanchez's son Tonie which cause danger in their lives.

programme.title: Shake, Rattle & Roll 8
programme.desc: A party takes place on a forbidden floor; a naughty child learns that her nanny is a vampire; a monster stalks accident survivors.

programme.title: Jologs
programme.desc: Filipinos (Diether Ocampo, Patrick Garcia, Vhong Navarro) from all different backgrounds deal with the intricacies of daily life.

programme.title: Pa- Siyam
programme.desc: Five children return to perform the funeral rite pasiyam for their deceased mother. Their belief that she died of natural causes is challenged when eerie supernatural events occur in the house.

programme.title: Ang Tanging Pamilya
programme.desc: A young woman accepts a marriage proposal from her long-distance boyfriend but has no idea their families will soon be at war.

programme.title: Milyonaryong Mini
programme.desc: Berting, a carefree playboy, believes that all the people in his life are after his money. Because of his attitude, Berting's father decides to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Father Jejemon
programme.desc: Father Jejemon, a musician, teaches a bunch of rebellious children to sing in the church choir. However, his simple life takes a turn for the worse when he gets accused of child molestation.

programme.title: Maria Went To Town
programme.desc: Although triplets are separated at birth due to a number of chaotic instances, the siblings cross paths and reunite 20 years later after one of them gets involved in a hilarious mess.

programme.title: Isprikitik: Walastik Kung Pumitik
programme.desc: A comedy directed by Efren Jarlego, featuring Redford White.

programme.title: Tatlong Taong Walang Diyos
programme.desc: World War II shatters the idyllic life of schoolteacher Rosario, and after the Japanese Capt. Masugi drunkenly forces himself on her, he desperately tries to return to her good graces and keep her safe amidst the war and the villagers' suspicion.

programme.title: Mater Dolorosa
programme.desc: A woman (Gina Alajar) faces the greatest test of her family loyalty and criminal empire when a mayor launches an anti-vice campaign in their city.

programme.title: The B Side
programme.desc: The host leads conversations exploring current trends in sports, fashion and entertainment; she delves into diverse aspects of popular culture with leading personalities.

programme.title: My Darling Domestik
programme.desc: Pedring keeps on changing jobs because of his sloppy work from being a waiter to becoming a car mechanic and assistant in a sculpture shop. One day he gets drunk and falls asleep in a container van bound for Hong Kong and ends up there.

programme.desc: The poaching crisis intensifies and poachers turn their attention to orphanages. After losing her mother, four-week-old Jamila finally finds sanctuary at The Rhino Orphanage.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s first stop on his food trail of South Africa is the bustling city of Cape Town. Here, he visits a lively farmers market and cooks up a Cape Malay Curry in Bo Kaap.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren continues his food trail along South Africa’s Cape Coast, stopping off at the township of Khayelitsha, home to some inspiring micro-farming initiatives, before arriving at Grootbos Private Nature Reserve.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren heads to the Cape Winelands, where he tastes a variety of local wines including Pinotage, a signature South African red, and Ratafia, a unique and complex fortified wine.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s next stop on his food trail is Tswalu Nature Reserve, in the heart of the Kalahari Desert. Warren then meets with acclaimed Chef Marnus to cook up some exciting South African delicacies.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren heads to the coastal city of Durban - where he’s staying at the iconic Oyster Box hotel.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: In Durban, Warren visits the famous restaurant Max’s Lifestyle for an indulgent Shisa Nyama experience, before meeting with local guide Thoko to visit a nearby Zulu village.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S6)
programme.desc: A driver arrives at the border with more than just merchandise in his van. In Madrid, officers make a gruesome discovery in a passenger’s luggage.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S6)

programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino
programme.desc: Aralin ang pagpapantig, pagbibigay ng kahulugan sa mga salita, pagbuo ng mga pangungusap, pagbabasa ng teksto, at kung ano ang mga pang-ukol, pang-abay, at salitang kilos.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Understand more about time, standard measures of length, mass and capacity and area through square-tile units, alongside pictographs with and without scales.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Identify pronouns and prepositions, and how to read, match, and write words that use short vowels.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Pahalagahan ang kagalingang pansibiko bilang pakikibahagi sa mga layunin ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa pangngalan, panghalip, at iba't ibang elemento ng kuwento, at kung paano magsulat ng kuwento at magbigay ng kahulugan ng mga salita.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Know how to convert time, what are the linear, mass and capacity measures, the area of square and rectangle, bar graphs, and outcomes of an event.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Learn more about adjectives, adverbs, maps, graphs, how to read words, and how to restate facts from texts.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang mga gawaing pangkabuhayan at bahaging ginagampanan ng pamahalaan at ang mga kasapi nito, mga pinuno at iba pang naglilingkod tungo sa pagkakaisa, kaayusan at kaunlaran ng mga lalawigan sa kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Find out more about people, animals, plants, landforms and bodies of water, and their importance. Discover the types and effects of weather as they relate to daily activities, health and safety, and the natural objects in the sky affect one’s daily activities.

programme.title: Grade 5 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano magbigay ng mga mahalagang pangyayari, paksa, at opinyon tungkol sa napakinggan o nabasang teksto, kung paano wastong magbaybay ng mga salita at maglarawan ng tagpuan at tauhan.

programme.title: Grade 5 Math
programme.desc: Learn more about area, volume, temperature, line graphs, and experimental probability.

programme.title: Grade 5 English
